name: JSF++: Run-Time Checking Provided
description: Safety-critical (SEAL 1/2) software makes provision for run-time checking (defensive programming).
rationale: JSF++ AV Rule 15: provision shall be made for run-time checking (defensive programming); for SEAL 1 or SEAL 2 software, provisions ensure proper operation of software and system function.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
